profiles.current_support_level: not implemented as an app surface
profiles.notes: Reserved for a future richer browser experience; Compatibility Surface Strategy v0 keeps this separate from lite/text/files and does not make one app serve every client.
The active profile for the current public_site artifact and static demo pages; Compatibility Surface Strategy v0 keeps this as one projection of the same resolver truth.

Lite/Text/Files Seed Surfaces v0 implements simple no-JS/no-CSS HTML pages generated from public data summaries; Compatibility Surface Strategy v0 defines this as a seeded static projection, not a live app.

Lite/Text/Files Seed Surfaces v0 implements plain text files generated from public data summaries; Compatibility Surface Strategy v0 defines this as the text-browser and automation-friendly seed projection.
Lite/Text/Files Seed Surfaces v0 implements a static file-tree index, manifest, and SHA256SUMS without executable downloads; Compatibility Surface Strategy v0 keeps snapshots and mirrors future.

profiles.current_support_level: consumer contract exists, runtime not implemented
profiles.notes: Future offline static bundle profile; Signed Snapshot Consumer Contract v0 defines read order, checksum posture, and v0 signature-placeholder limitations without implementing a snapshot reader runtime.

must_support: Native Client Contract v0 lane and input limits
checksum verification where snapshot consumption is in scope
prohibited_dependencies: download or execution automation before policy
profiles.current_support_level: contract/design only; CLI is current local native-like surface
profiles.notes: Native Client Contract v0 defines future Windows/macOS/native lanes, inputs, verification requirements, and prohibitions without implementing GUI clients, native projects, installer automation, FFI, relay sidecars, or runtime wiring.

prohibited_dependencies: write/admin route exposure to old clients
profiles.current_support_level: design-only contract exists, runtime not implemented
profiles.notes: Relay Surface Design v0 records the future local protocol bridge profile, operator checklist, and security/privacy defaults. Relay Prototype Planning v0 selects a future localhost-only read-only static local HTTP prototype shape. No relay behavior, network service, protocol server, private-data exposure, live backend proxy, live probe, or write/admin route is implemented.

must_support: no live-backend assumption unless capability flags enable it
reserved /api/v1 routes must be treated as future until live_backend is enabled
prohibited_dependencies: live backend assumptions in static data
profiles.current_support_level: static data implemented, /api/v1 live backend handoff reserved only
profiles.notes: The profile does not guarantee a live public backend exists; Live Backend Handoff Contract v0 reserves /api/v1 as future experimental contract-only work, and Compatibility Surface Strategy v0 keeps static data distinct from live API behavior.
